initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT words, COUNT(*) AS anagram_count
FROM word_list
WHERE words LIKE 'r%'
  AND (LENGTH(words) = 4 OR LENGTH(words) = 5)
GROUP BY words
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY words ASC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT words, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM word_list AS w2 
        WHERE w2.words != word_list.words 
          AND LENGTH(w2.words) = LENGTH(word_list.words) 
          AND w2.words LIKE 'r%' 
          AND GROUP_CONCAT(SUBSTR(w2.words, n.n, 1)) = GROUP_CONCAT(SUBSTR(word_list.words, n.n, 1) ORDER BY SUBSTR(w2.words, n.n, 1))
       ) AS anagram_count
FROM word_list
CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5) AS n
WHERE word_list.words LIKE 'r%'
  AND LENGTH(word_list.words) IN (4, 5)
GROUP BY word_list.words
HAVING anagram_count > 0
ORDER BY word_list.words ASC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    w.words AS word,
    COUNT(*) AS anagram_count
FROM word_list w
JOIN word_list a 
    ON w.words != a.words 
    AND LENGTH(w.words) = LENGTH(a.words) 
    AND w.words = a.words COLLATE BINARY
WHERE w.words LIKE 'r%' 
    AND (LENGTH(w.words) = 4 OR LENGTH(w.words) = 5)
GROUP BY w.words
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY w.words ASC
LIMIT 10;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    w.words AS word,
    COUNT(*) AS anagram_count
FROM word_list w
JOIN word_list a 
    ON w.words != a.words 
    AND LENGTH(w.words) = LENGTH(a.words) 
    AND w.words = a.words COLLATE BINARY
WHERE w.words LIKE 'r%' 
    AND (LENGTH(w.words) = 4 OR LENGTH(w.words) = 5)
GROUP BY w.words
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY w.words ASC
LIMIT 10;
